headline: Jim Cramer Says He Would Avoid Blue Owl and Prefers Blackstone
summary: Blackstone Inc. (NYSE:BX) was among the stocks Jim Cramer commented on as he advised investors on how to take advantage of Wednesday’s market rotation.
